name: Dongguan Aohai Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Dongguan Aohai Technology Co., Ltd. engages in the research, development, production, and sale of consumer electronics products in China. The company operates in the fields of low-power smart charging, smart mobile power, wireless charging, and integration with power and PC power supplies. Its products include chargers, mobile power supplies, smart homes, and AI hardware, as well as energy products, such as personal energy packs and smart charging posts. The company was founded in 2003 and is based in Dongguan, China.
